title: Graduate Engineer Trainee in Pune
description:
Key Responsibilities


Traveling within Pune (Bhosari, Chakan, MIDC areas) for client meetings and site visits.
Assisting the senior team with on-site installation, wiring, and commissioning of machinery at client locations.


About Company: Sigmatech is a fast-growing industrial automation and manufacturing hub based in Pune, the heart of India's engineering sector. We bridge the gap between high-end industrial hardware and modern software solutions.

Our Core Operations Are Divided Into Two Powerful Verticals


Industrial Trading: We are a trusted partner for critical automation components, specializing in Servo Motors, Servo Drives, PLCs, HMIs, VFDs, and CNC machinery parts.
Manufacturing & Solutions: We design and manufacture custom machinery and provide end-to-end automation solutions that help factories optimize their energy and production efficiency.


At Sigmatech, we believe in the "Phygital" revolution, combining physical engineering with digital intelligence. We are currently scaling our operations to capture the massive demand in the Pune/Maharashtra industrial belt and are looking for driven individuals to grow with us.

title: HR Trainee
description:
Job Description: HR Trainee – Operations

Department: Human Resources

Employment Type: Trainee / Full-Time

Location: Kharadi Pune

Experience: Fresher or 0–1 year (HR background preferred)

Service Agreement: Mandatory 2 Years

Role Summary

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented HR Trainee – Operations to support daily HR operational activities. This role provides practical exposure to core HR functions such as onboarding, employee lifecycle management, HR documentation, and coordination with internal teams and external partners.

Key Responsibilities HR Operations & Administration


Support end-to-end onboarding and offboarding processes
Maintain and regularly update employee records and HR databases
Assist in preparing HR documentation, employee letters, and compliance records
Coordinate background verification (BGV) and onboarding formalities
Support attendance, leave management, and employee data tracking


Employee Lifecycle Management


Coordinate with employees for joining formalities and document collection
Assist with employee confirmations, role changes, and exit processes
Support employee engagement initiatives and internal HR communications


Compliance & Process Support


Ensure adherence to HR policies, processes, and SOPs
Assist in audits, statutory compliance documentation, and HR reporting
Maintain strict confidentiality of employee data and records


Coordination & Reporting


Collaborate closely with the HR team, internal departments, and vendors
Prepare HR reports, trackers, and dashboards as required
Support HR projects and continuous process improvement initiatives


Skills & Qualifications


MBA / MSW / PGDM in Human Resources or equivalent (completed or pursuing)
Strong verbal and written communication skills
Proficiency in MS Excel, MS Word, and basic HR systems
High attention to detail with a strong willingness to learn
Ability to manage confidential information with integrity


What We Offer


Hands-on exposure to end-to-end HR Operations
Structured training, learning, and mentorship
Career growth opportunities within the HR function
A professional, collaborative, and supportive work environment
Cab facility and insurance benefits

title: Intern Software Developer
description:
Job Description for C#/.NET Engineering Intern

Location: [Pune, Maharashtra]

Job Type: Intern (Part-time)

Duration: [3-6 months]

Responsibilities



Assist in the design, development, and maintenance of software applications using C# and .NET technologies.
Write clean, scalable, and efficient code under the guidance of senior engineers.
Collaborate with team members to design, implement, and test new features and enhancements.
Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve issues and defects in existing software applications.
Participate in code reviews to maintain high-quality coding standards and best practices.
Help maintain code quality, organization, and automation, potentially using tools like Git for version control.
Assist in creating and maintaining technical documentation throughout the software development lifecycle (SDLC).



Required Skills & Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in engineering (Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field).
Basic to intermediate knowledge of C# programming language and understanding of the .NET framework (or .NET Core), WPF.
Strong understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts.
Familiarity with database concepts and knowledge of SQL (SQL Server preferred).
Basic understanding of front-end technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript is a plus.
Familiarity with version control systems, specifically Git, is highly desirable.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with excellent attention to detail.
Eagerness to learn new technologies and a positive attitude toward challenges.
Excellent communication and teamwork skills.

title: Graduate Engineering Trainee
description:
Job Title: GET – Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineer (R&D)

Company: Frido

Location: Pune, India

Role Type: (On site)

Department: Research & Development




Role Overview

We are looking for a Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering to join

our R&D team. The role involves working on end-to-end product development including design,

prototyping, validation, and integration of mechanical, electronic, and control systems.

This is a hands-on role suited for candidates who are curious, adaptable, and eager to work in a fast

paced, innovation-driven startup environment.




Key Responsibilities

• Assist in product design and development from concept to prototype.

• Create and modify 3D CAD models, assemblies, and technical drawings.

• Perform basic CAE/FEA analysis for design validation and optimization.

• Work on mechanical-electronic integration for functional prototypes.

• Develop and test basic embedded/control logic for prototypes.

• Support testing, validation, and iteration of designs.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams (electronics, software, manufacturing).

• Participate in research, benchmarking, and design improvement activities.




Required Skills & Qualifications

Education

B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering (Freshers / Recent Graduates)




Technical Skills

Design & CAD

• Understanding of mechanical design principles

• Proficiency in at least one CAD tool:

o SolidWorks / Creo / NX / CATIA or equivalent




CAE / Simulation

• Basic understanding of FEA concepts

• Exposure to tools such as:

o ANSYS Workbench / SolidWorks Simulation or equivalent




Electronics, Controls & Embedded Systems

• Fundamental understanding of electronics and control systems

• Hands-on experience with microcontrollers / embedded platforms:

o Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ESP32, Jetson Nano or equivalent




Soft Skills & Attributes

• Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking

• Ability to learn quickly and adapt in a dynamic environment

• Willingness to take ownership and responsibility

• Comfortable working in a startup / fast-paced R&D setting

• Good communication and teamwork skills




Good to Have (Preferred)

• Experience with prototyping tools (3D printing, basic fabrication)

• Exposure to product development lifecycle

• Basic knowledge of materials and manufacturing processes

• Experience with interfacing sensors, motors, or actuators

• Interest in interdisciplinary systems (mechanical + electronics + software)




What You’ll Gain

• Hands-on exposure to real-world product development

• Opportunity to work on innovative, user-centric products

• Cross-domain learning across mechanical, electronics, and embedded systems

• Fast growth in a high-impact R&D environment




Interested candidates can share their CV on sanobar.s@myfrido.com

Show more

title: Human Resources (HR) Trainee in Navi Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi, Ghaziabad, Gurgaon, Pune, Faridabad
description:
As a Human Resources Trainee at Spinfluence Technology, you will have the opportunity to gain hands-on experience in various HR functions while working in a dynamic and innovative tech company. Your role will involve assisting with recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, and other HR activities.

Key Responsibilities Include


Assisting with recruitment process, including posting job ads, screening resumes, and scheduling interviews.
Conducting new employee orientation and assisting with the onboarding process.
Maintaining employee records and updating HR databases.
Assisting with employee relations issues and conflict resolution.
Assisting with performance management processes, including performance reviews and goal setting.
Providing support for HR projects and initiatives.
Utilizing MS-Office, MS-Word, and MS-Excel for various HR tasks and projects.


If you are a motivated and organized individual with a passion for HR and technology, this is the perfect opportunity for you to kickstart your career in HR. Join us at Spinfluence Technology and be a part of our dynamic team!

About Company: Spinfluence Technology delivers innovative IT consulting services in Sitecore, .NET, Oracle, and SAP to help businesses transform, scale, and thrive in the digital era. We specialize in providing end-to-end IT consulting services tailored to your unique business needs. With expertise in Sitecore for personalized digital experiences, .NET for scalable application development, Oracle for robust database solutions, and SAP for seamless enterprise integration, we empower businesses to achieve their goals efficiently and effectively. Our team of certified professionals is dedicated to delivering innovative, future-ready solutions that drive growth, enhance productivity, and ensure long-term success.

title: Human Resource Trainee
company: Western India Electromedical Systems Pvt Ltd
description:
Company Description

Western India Electromedical Systems Pvt Ltd is a healthcare HVAC company specializing in the design and installation of Modular Operation Theatres, Modular ICU/PICU/NICU, and IVF labs. Established in 1997, the company has been at the forefront of creating infection-free zones and highly sterile environments for critical healthcare facilities.




Role Description

We are seeking a full-time Human Resource Trainee to join our team at our office located in Chinchwad, Pune District. The role will involve supporting daily HR operations, learning about HR policies, assisting in personnel management, managing employee benefits, and contributing to the development and implementation of HR initiatives. The trainee will gain hands-on experience in all facets of HR management in an on-site setting.




Qualifications

Knowledge of Human Resources (HR) and HR Management practices
Understanding of HR Policies and Employee Benefits administration
Basic skills in Personnel Management
Strong organizational and time management skills
Excellent verbal and written communication abilities
Proficiency with office software (e.g., Word, Excel, and PowerPoint)
Relevant educational background in HR or Business Administration
Eagerness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced environment

title: Legal Intern
description:
About Us

We are a global climate technologies company engineered for sustainability. We create sustainable and efficient residential, commercial and industrial spaces through HVACR technologies. We protect temperature-sensitive goods throughout the cold chain. And we bring comfort to people globally. Best-in-class engineering, design and manufacturing combined with category-leading brands in compression, controls, software and monitoring solutions result in next-generation climate technology that is built for the needs of the world ahead. 

Whether you are a professional looking for a career change, an undergraduate student exploring your first opportunity, or recent graduate with an advanced degree, we have opportunities that will allow you to innovate, be challenged and make an impact. Join our team and start your journey today!


Role & responsibilities


We are looking to engage a Legal Intern in the law dept for Copeland India, Pune location to assist in implementation of 2 new Laws which are getting implemented in India.


New Labour Codes and the
Digital Personal Data Protection Act


Tenure of the engagement would be around 9-12 months

Preferred Candidate Profile

Recent graduate in LL.B. (or awaiting final results) Strong research, drafting, and communication skills Eagerness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced legal setting

Duration: [9-12 months]


What We Offer:
Exposure to real-world legal matters
Experience of working in a MNC environment
Opportunities to draft, research, and implement the labour Codes and DPDP Act
A supportive and learning-focused work environment
Location: [ Pune]


Our Commitment to Our People

Across the globe, we are united by a singular Purpose: Sustainability is no small ambition. That’s why everything we do is geared toward a sustainable future—for our generation and all those to come. Through groundbreaking innovations, HVACR technology and cold chain solutions, we are reducing carbon emissions and improving energy efficiency in spaces of all sizes, from residential to commercial to industrial.

Our employees are our greatest strength. We believe that our culture of passion, openness, and collaboration empowers us to work toward the same goal - to make the world a better place. We invest in the end-to-end development of our people, beginning at onboarding and through senior leadership, so they can thrive personally and professionally.

Flexible and competitive benefits plans offer the right options to meet your individual/family needs. We provide employees with flexible time off plans, including paid parental leave (maternal and paternal), vacation and holiday leave. 

Together, we have the opportunity – and the power – to continue to revolutionize the technology behind air conditioning, heating and refrigeration, and cultivate a better future. Learn more about us and how you can join our team!

Our Commitment to Inclusion & Belonging

At Copeland, we cultivate a strong sense of inclusion and belonging where individuals of all backgrounds, and with diverse perspectives, are embraced and treated fairly to enable a stronger workforce. Our employee resource groups play an important role in culture and community building at Copeland.

Equal Opportunity Employer

Copeland is an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, race, color, religion, national origin, age, marital status, political affiliation, sexual orientation, gender identity, genetic information, disability or protected veteran status. We are committed to providing a workplace free of any discrimination or harassment.
Show more

description:

📍 Location: Chakan, Pune

🏢 Company: DMC Finishing School Pvt. Ltd.

👥 No. of Vacancies: 20




Job Summary:

We are looking for dynamic and enthusiastic HR Trainees for a Generalist role who will be responsible for managing end-to-end HR operations including recruitment, onboarding, payroll coordination, and employee management.




Key Responsibilities:




Recruitment & Staffing:

• Handle end-to-end blue-collar recruitment under NAPS/NATS/WILP/Staffing services

• Source and screen candidates through job portals, field recruitment, referrals, and local networks

• Schedule and coordinate interviews with clients and internal teams




Onboarding & Documentation:

• Manage joining formalities and employee documentation

• Ensure proper onboarding and induction of new hires

• Maintain employee records and compliance documents




Payroll & Attendance Management:

• Assist in payroll processing and salary coordination

• Manage attendance, leave records, and shift data

• Coordinate with accounts and HR teams for payroll accuracy




HR Operations & MIS:

• Maintain daily trackers, reports, and MIS data

• Prepare recruitment and HR reports as required

• Ensure proper data management and reporting




Client & Employee Coordination:

• Liaise with clients and internal HR teams to fulfill manpower requirements

• Handle employee queries and provide HR support

• Assist in resolving basic employee grievances




Required Skills & Competencies:

• Strong communication and interpersonal skills

• Basic knowledge of HR processes (Recruitment, Payroll, Attendance)

• Proficiency in MS Excel, Word, and data handling

• Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment

• Willingness to travel for recruitment drives, as required




Eligibility Criteria:

• Graduate in any discipline (MBA/HR preferred)

• 0–2 years of experience (Freshers with strong interest in HR can also apply)

title: Software Engineer Intern
description:
*Exciting internship opportunities available! We are hiring two interns - one focused on Machine Learning with an immediate start, and one with C++ experience starting in June/July. Both internships run through December.*




Your Role at a Glance

We are looking for an Intern to join our Software Engineering department in our Pune, India office. Our department builds a large-scale, commercial CAD/CAM application used extensively throughout the manufacturing industry.




As a member of our Software Engineering department, you'll use modern techniques to solve complex software development challenges. Our Software Engineering department works in a wide range of areas, including toolpath generation, graphics, user experience development, CAD development, and more. Depending on your interests and skill set, you could find yourself modernizing some of our legacy code using the latest C++ standard, developing hybrid cloud features on Microsoft Azure platform, implementing new user interfaces in C#, React, WPF and XAML, streamline and optimizing our build and deployment tools, or creating new algorithms to drive CNC machine tools.




To succeed in this role, you will need to understand software engineering best practices, including design patterns and the SOLID and DRY principles. You have a drive to constantly improve your software development skills, and will have a passion for clean, well-written code. In addition, you'll be a proactive self-starter who can communicate well with both technical and non-technical coworkers.




How You’ll Drive Success

Essential duties & responsibilities

Write software to fix defects and add features to complex commercial CAD/CAM software.
Write unit tests to test functionality and improve test coverage.
Improve and modify tools and processes used to build and test our products.
Document code, tools, and processes to ensure consistency and improve reusability of tools and code.




The Talents We’re Seeking

Education & Experience

1+ years of experience developing software.
A solid understanding of object-oriented development.
Familiar with standard software development practices such as source control, peer reviews, and unit testing.
Ability to work independently, as well as within a team, to support the overall strategy and departmental goals.
Solid organizational skills, attention to detail and the ability to use sound judgement as needed.
Dedicated individual who takes a pro-active approach to learning.
Ability to clearly communicate with both technical and non-technical co-workers.




Who We Are

At Mastercam, we do not just keep pace with manufacturing—we set the pace. For over 40 years, we have been the name behind the breakthroughs, the partner for those who refuse to settle. When the industry says “too complex,” we say, “challenge accepted.”




We are more than software. We are a movement of makers, innovators, and problem-solvers driving transformation across the globe.




Backed by a network of 400 Channel Partners and a thriving developer community, Mastercam delivers the tools and expertise to turn ambitious ideas into flawless reality. From aerospace to automotive, medical to education, we empower manufacturers to push boundaries and redefine what is possible.




As part of Intelligent Manufacturing and the Sandvik Group, we are leading the charge in digital transformation. Our team of 350+ professionals is united by a single mission: to help achieve precision, productivity, and performance without compromise.




Our Core Values? They are not just words. They are how we win:

Winning Together: Collaboration is not optional—it is the engine that drives us.
Curiosity: We question, we explore, we innovate. Every day.
Responsibility: Safety, integrity, and sustainability aren’t boxes to check—they are the foundation of trust.
Customer-Focused: We listen. We adapt. We deliver. Always.




Innovation. Collaboration. Growth. That is the Mastercam way. Explore more at www.mastercam.com, connect on LinkedIn, and join the conversation with #mastercam.

The next big challenge is waiting—are you ready to accept?




It is the policy of the company to provide equal employment opportunities to all employees and employment applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, or national origin or any other classification protected by applicable local or state laws.




EOE/M/F/Vet/Disabled are encouraged to apply.




We are an E-Verify Employer.

Show more

title: Management Trainee-Group Sales-Broking, Pune
description:
Key Result Areas: Write the key results expected from the job and the supporting actions for each of these key result areas (For a majority of jobs typically there could be 4- 7 key result areas)*


Key Result Areas *

Supporting Actions*

Driving sales via Various channels for group sales


Initiate and maintain continuous interaction with brokers and other intermediaries
Obtain quote request from market & Deliver them on time to the client/partners
Weekly tracking of business growth. Seeking support from various stake holders towards closure of business


Partner engagement


Understand market dynamics and offering of other manufacturers to the channel partners
Drive channel strategy as per cos directives to increase revenue growth in profitable segments (like SME and creditor) / large clients
Take regular feedback from channel partners to innovate products and solutions at an organizational level
Pursue client specific requirement along with channel partners to support conversion


Track channel profitability

P & L


Working with product team to focus on conversions and retention of profitable clients
Create additional profitable revenue streams basis new trends in the employee benefit space
Responsible for driving segmented business and profitability to ensure achievement of target business numbers like SME and creditor.


Renewal persistency


Decoding client’s requirement, pain points and opportunity areas
Providing need based solutions to clients to increase stickiness.
This would involve building & strengthening relationships across the various stakeholders within the company, within the concerned partner for the account as also within the internal stakeholders in the co. to ensure that the offering we propose, meets their expectations.

title: Graduate Apprentice Trainee
description:
Transport is at the core of modern society. Imagine using your expertise to shape sustainable transport and infrastructure solutions for the future. If you seek to make a difference on a global scale, working with next-gen technologies and the sharpest collaborative teams, then we could be a perfect match.

We value your data privacy and therefore do not accept applications via mail.

Who We Are And What We Believe In

We are committed to shaping the future landscape of efficient, safe, and sustainable transport solutions. Fulfilling our mission creates countless career opportunities for talents across the group’s leading brands and entities.

Applying to this job offers you the opportunity to join Volvo Group. Every day, you will be working with some of the sharpest and most creative brains in our field to be able to leave our society in better shape for the next generation. We are passionate about what we do, and we thrive on teamwork. We are almost 100,000 people united around the world by a culture of care, inclusiveness, and empowerment.

About Volvo Group

At Volvo Group, we are driving prosperity through transport and infrastructure solutions, shaping the future of sustainable mobility. As part of our commitment to nurturing young talent, we invite fresh engineering graduates to join us under the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS). This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on industry experience and work alongside experts on real-world projects

Eligibility Criteria


Education: B.Tech / B.E. in Materials Technology or Chemical Engineering
Year of Graduation: 2023, 2024, or 2025
Program: National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) .


Key Skills & Knowledge Areas


Strong fundamentals in Material Science (metals, polymers, chemicals) and Sustainability
Knowledge of PLM Tools is an advantage
Excellent Proficiency in MS Office tools (Excel, Word, PowerPoint). Advanced Excel skills (pivots, macros etc) and PowerBI is desired.
Good analytical and problem-solving skills
Effective communication and teamwork abilities


Roles & Responsibilities


Support Sustainability team in Life Cycle Inventory (LCI) of Target trucks.
Support team in preparing carbon mitigation roadmap and idea generation.
Support team in preparing mitigation strategy for PFAS, Heavy Metals, Substances of Concern (SOC)
Support team in End of Life (ELV) calculations
Learn and apply Volvo’s engineering standards and procedures
Participate in technical reviews, data analysis, and report preparation


Program Duration

As per NATS guidelines

Trucks Technology & Industrial Division hire team players who are ready to create real customer impact. Our decentralized teams work close to our customers, with speed and autonomy, to build what they truly need.

Join us to collaborate on innovative, sustainable technologies that redefine how we design, build, and deliver value. Bring your curiosity, your expertise, and your collaborative energy, and together, we’ll turn bold ideas into tangible solutions for our customers and contribute to a more sustainable tomorrow.
Show more

title: Management Trainee
description:
As a Management Trainee- User Research you will play a key role in helping us deeply understand our users. Your primary responsibility will be to connect with students through calls, gather insights on their needs, motivations, and challenges, and translate those conversations into meaningful inputs for our product and business teams. This role is ideal for someone who is curious, empathetic, and comfortable speaking with people every day.







The charter for this role will include:

Conduct telephonic and virtual conversations with students to understand their journeys, needs, and decision-making processes.
Ask the right questions to uncover insights around study abroad aspirations, challenges, and behaviors.
Document and synthesize conversations into clear insights, patterns, and actionable takeaways.
Work closely with product, growth, and business teams to share user feedback and influence decisions.
Continuously improve research quality by refining scripts, questions, and approaches based on learnings.







Ideal Persona would:

Strong communication skills with high comfort in speaking to new people over calls every day.
Naturally curious with the ability to ask thoughtful questions and listen actively.
Empathetic and able to build trust quickly with students from diverse backgrounds.
Structured thinker who can convert conversations into clear insights and patterns.
Self-driven and comfortable working in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment.







Everyone at Leap is entrepreneurial, moves fast and operates with extreme ownership.

There is minimal management and extreme autonomy.

If the above defines you, you will fight in snugly
